title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 37
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost phone charger.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you found your phone charger? You looked worried earlier. || Man: Not at first. I searched my bedroom because I remembered using it there, then checked our classroom, but nobody had seen it. || Woman: So where did it turn up? || Man: My friend has just messaged me. [1]It is plugged in at my friend's house[/1]. I must have left it there. I will collect it at lunch because I need it for charging my phone tonight. || Woman: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where is the phone charger?

options.A: Plugged in at a friend's house

items.explanation: The speaker says the phone charger is plugged in at a friend's house.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a birthday present for my uncle? You said you were going into town after school. || Boy: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered a tie, because that seemed a safe choice. || Girl: What about a travel mug? That might have been useful. || Boy: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [1]I bought a crime novel because he reads on the train to work[/1]. || Girl: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Boy: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a crime novel because he reads on the train to work.

items.context: You hear two people talking about helping at an events centre.
items.audio_script: Woman: What job are you doing at an events centre this afternoon? I thought you were going to blow up balloons. || Man: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Woman: So will you bake a cake instead? || Man: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [1]I have to move chairs into the garden because guests will eat outside[/1]. || Woman: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Man: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they have to move chairs into the garden because guests will eat outside.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the cycling tour.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the cycling tour tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Boy: I was going to pack a jacket. Do we need that? || Girl: No, it is not on the list. || Boy: Perhaps I should take a map instead. || Girl: You can, but [1]everyone must bring a helmet because nobody is allowed to ride without one[/1]. || Boy: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring a helmet because nobody is allowed to ride without one.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still planning to visit the aquarium at the weekend? I had already arranged everything for it. || Boy: I am afraid not. The aquarium tickets sold out and our friends have spare concert tickets, so that plan will not work now. || Girl: We could go bowling instead. Would that be easier? || Boy: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [1]Let us see a concert at the weekend instead[/1]. || Girl: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Boy: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they see a concert at the weekend instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about study meeting.
items.audio_script: Woman: Do you know where study meeting is being held today? I was going to the library, where we usually meet. || Man: Do not go there. You need online research and the library computers are unavailable, so the organiser changed the room. || Woman: I wondered whether it might be in the café. || Man: No, that is not right either. [1]We need to meet in the computer room this afternoon[/1]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Man: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will study meeting be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the computer room.

items.context: You hear two people talking about preparations for a party.
items.audio_script: Girl: What are you helping with before the party? I thought you had to put out chairs. || Boy: My cousin is already doing that, so I do not need to. || Girl: Are you going to make sandwiches instead? || Boy: No, the food is ready already. [1]Mum wants me to put the chairs outside before guests arrive[/1]. || Girl: That should be simple enough if you start soon. || Boy: I hope so. I want everything ready before our guests arrive this afternoon, because Mum is very busy today.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: Mum wants me to put the chairs outside before guests arrive.
